alert.proxy_failed: ⚠ Demand Proxy health check failed and is retrying. Press Enter to dismiss.
proxy.health_unrecognized: Running (health check passed; process not identified){health}
proxy.stale_pf: Possible stale PF route (proxy not verified)
console.title: Accessor Console
console.confirm: Problems found. Start / refresh now? [y] Yes  [n] No
console.choose_projects: Choose projects: press 1-7 to toggle; Enter confirms; Esc cancels
console.project_input: Project numbers (comma-separated; Enter keeps current selection):
console.invalid_project_input: Invalid input; current selection was kept.
console.all_normal: Everything is healthy. Press Enter to return
console.checking: Checking roles, project credentials, and Proxy…
console.proxy_missing: Demand Proxy connector is not configured.
console.job_retry: Refresh job exited unexpectedly (code {code}); retrying in 60 seconds
console.sudo_prompt: Enter the sudo password, then press Enter (input is hidden):
console.confirm_input: Issues found. Enter y to start / refresh, or n to return.
console.proxy_alert: Demand Proxy health check failed and is retrying. Press Enter to dismiss.
console.project_hint: Project numbers (for example 1,3,7); Enter selects all projects.
console.password_hint: Enter the sudo password, then press Enter (input is hidden).
console.running_hint: The operation is running in the background; status remains available.
console.enable_complete: Start / refresh finished; the background refresh job is running.
console.enable_running: Start / refresh is already running; please wait.
scheduler.external_takeover: Unavailable (external Proxy health check 0/{total}; taking over and restarting)
scheduler.external_wait_exit: Waiting for external processes to exit: {pids}
scheduler.external_no_health: Running (external Proxy; no health check configured)
sshuttle.sudo_expired: sudo authorization expired; use Start / refresh and enter the password
sshuttle.network_prepare_unavailable: Unable to run sudo network preparation: {error}
